default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Design walkthrough for Abnormal Security's blog graphics created by GrowthX team, ensuring alignment with new brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team created initial blog graphics; Rachel (Abnormal) to provide detailed brand guidelines and Figma access](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Graphics look good overall; minor adjustments needed (logo placement, use of people images, incorporating new design elements)](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Rachel to comment on shared Figma file; GrowthX to create updated templates for final approval](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### Current Design Review

  - [Initial designs use minimal color, aligning with new vibrant color scheme](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Logo should be kept in white or black, preferably in a square shape with an outline box](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [New "design furniture" elements like quotes and "alphabet" shapes can be incorporated](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Gradients and textures are available for use in designs](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

### Image Usage Guidelines

  - [For quotes, clarify if the image represents the person speaking](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Use real team members or reference specific guides (e.g., CISO guide) when including people](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Be cautious with stock photos to avoid confusion about who's speaking](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### New Brand Elements

  - [Introduced tab system and card treatment with notches](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Right-aligned layouts as an alternative to previous designs](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Highlight effect for darker backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Various textures and layering options available](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Next Steps for Design Process

  - [Rachel to comment on shared Figma file and provide access to visual identity system](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create more variants and clean up existing designs](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Aim for final templates ready for approval by next day](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Collaboration Tools

  - [Rachel to be added to relevant Slack channel for design discussions](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Figma files to be shared for easier element access and referencing](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachel to comment on shared Figma file and share visual identity Figma](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create updated templates with more variants by next day](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Rachel to review updated templates and provide final approval](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Emily to add Rachel to relevant Slack channel for ongoing design collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/soaot-YxMXYFVnPpBThoJDDCvExHoZ8h?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

action_items.description: Comment on GrowthX's Figma file with design feedback
Share Abnormal Security visual identity Figma file with GrowthX team
Create updated designs based on Rachel's feedback, ready for review tomorrow
Add Rachel to Slack channel for design discussions
